name: 中文（简体）/ Simplified Chinese
note: Toddler-register Mandarin for the AAC board. Written to be what a mainland caregiver would naturally SAY to a 2-4 year old (抱抱, 尿尿, 还要), not dictionary glosses. Keys match taxonomy/category labels case-insensitively. `section` (needs|people|nouns|verbs) and `category` narrow a match for homonyms — most entries need neither. `pron` overrides the TTS text when the display text reads wrong aloud. status starts 'machine'; the review partner flips rows to 'reviewed' via the Lab CSV round-trip.
